news.title: Mandiant’s founder just raised $190M for his autonomous AI agent security startup
news.summary: Mandia, who sold his previous company Mandiant to Google for $5.4 billion in 2022, has launched an agentic security startup.

news.title: ChatGPT can now create interactive visuals to help you understand math and science concepts

news.title: U.S. military contractor likely built iPhone hacking tools used by Russian spies in Ukraine
news.summary: Google found a series of hacking tools they said were used by a Russian espionage group and a cybercriminal group in China. Sources from a U.S. government defense contractor said some of those hacking tools were theirs.

news.title: ‘Pokémon Pokopia’ is even better than ‘Animal Crossing: New Horizons’
news.summary: While "Animal Crossing" is pure escapism, "Pokopia" gives you the sensation of actually rehabilitating a broken world.

news.title: AgentMail raises $6M to build an email service for AI agents
news.summary: AgentMail provides an API platform that lets you give AI agents their own email inboxes, with support for two-way conversations, parsing, threading, labeling, searching, and replying.

news.title: States’ trial against Live Nation could move forward as soon as next week

news.summary: A federal judge has issued an order blocking Perplexity's web browser-based AI agents from placing Amazon orders on a user's behalf, as reported earlier by Bloomberg. news.title: Gemini burrows deeper into Google Workspace with revamped document creation and editing
news.summary: Gemini can now pull context from your files, emails, and more to create and edit documents.

news.title: DHS Ousts CBP Privacy Officers Who Questioned ‘Illegal’ Orders
news.summary: Department of Homeland Security leaders removed top privacy officers who objected to mislabeling government records to block their public release, WIRED has learned.

news.title: Our Favorite Earbuds for Samsung Owners Are on Sale
news.summary: The Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 FE are a great pairing for anyone with a Galaxy phone.

news.title: Fake AI Content About the Iran War Is All Over X
news.summary: X’s Grok is failing to accurately verify video footage from the Iran conflict and is sharing its own AI-generated images about the war.

news.title: A Trumpworld Events Company Is Raking In Millions in Federal Contracts
news.summary: The Trump administration has awarded Event Strategies several contracts—including one that could be worth up to $100 million—with little competition, according to federal filings.

news.title: GPS Attacks Near Iran Are Wreaking Havoc on Delivery and Mapping Apps
news.summary: Delivery apps are glitching and navigation routes are changing abruptly thanks to electronic warfare disrupting the satellite signals that power everything from missiles to your ride home.
